tasks.title: S-001 ログイン 画面実装 (Vertical Slice / UI) +dialog S-053
tasks.label: NEW

structural: STATE-DRIVEN: While S-001 page is rendered, the system shall include a `data-screen-id="S-001"` attribute on the root element.
STATE-DRIVEN: While S-001 page is rendered, the system shall display an h1 element with text matching screens.json[S-001].h1_text ("ログイン").
functional: EVENT-DRIVEN: When the S-001 page performs its primary action, the system shall call POST /api/auth/login via the typed API client.
EVENT-DRIVEN: When the S-001 page performs its primary action, the system shall call POST /api/auth/mfa/verify via the typed API client.
UNWANTED: If a backing API call from S-001 returns 4xx or 5xx, the system shall surface a non-technical error toast referencing the failing endpoint without leaking server stack traces.
EVENT-DRIVEN: When the user completes the primary flow on S-001, the system shall navigate to account_dashboard or workspace_dashboard (last visited).
EVENT-DRIVEN: When valid email/password is submitted to POST /api/auth/login, the system shall return 200 with access_token + refresh_token + user_id.
UNWANTED: If invalid credentials are submitted to POST /api/auth/login, the system shall return 401 with a generic message (no user enumeration).
STATE-DRIVEN: While MFA is enabled for the user, the system shall require POST /api/auth/mfa/verify with a valid TOTP code before issuing access_token.
STATE-DRIVEN: While the login response indicates mfa_required=true, the system shall show the mfa_challenge dialog (S-053 pattern) for TOTP entry before completing login.
